I need to understand the current plumb and vouch implementations in this Recipe Bottle project. Please read these files thoroughly and report back their contents and structure:

1. `Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh` — focus on constant naming patterns, especially `RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_*` family and any package-related constants
2. `Tools/rbk/rbfc_FoundryCore.sh` — focus on the plumb functions: `zrbfc_plumb_core`, `rbfc_plumb_full`, `rbfc_plumb_compact`, and any helper functions they use. Note all docker commands used.
3. `Tools/rbk/rbfv_FoundryVerify.sh` — focus on `rbfv_vouch` and any vouch-related functions. Note how vouch artifacts are pushed.
4. `Tools/rbk/rbgjv03-assemble-push-vouch.sh` — the cloud build vouch step
5. `Tools/rbk/rbfr_FoundryRetriever.sh` — check for any plumb/summon coupling

For each file, report:
- Line numbers of key functions
- The actual code of plumb and vouch functions
- How docker is currently used in plumb
- How vouch artifacts are tagged/pushed
- Any Registry API usage patterns already present

Be very thorough — I need the actual code, not summaries.

content.text: I'll thoroughly read each of these files to understand the plumb and vouch implementations. Let me start by reading them all in parallel.

34	  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
35	  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
36	  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
37	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
38	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
39	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
40	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"

48	  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
49	  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS

65	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7

91	
92	  # API Version Paths
93	  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
94	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"

99	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
100	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
101	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
102	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"

157	  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"

160	  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)

162	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Foundry Retriever - wrest and summon operations
20	# Director credentials for wrest; retriever credentials for summon
21	
22	set -euo pipefail
23	
24	# Multiple inclusion detection
25	test -z "${ZRBFR_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfr multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
26	ZRBFR_SOURCED=1
27	
28	# Source shared Foundry Core module
29	source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbfc_FoundryCore.sh"
30	
31	######################################################################
32	# Internal Functions (zrbfr_*)
33	
34	zrbfr_kindle() {
35	  test -z "${ZRBFR_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbfr already kindled"
36	
37	  buc_log_args 'Validate Foundry Core is kindled'
38	  zrbfc_sentinel
39	
40	  buc_log_args 'Define retriever temp file prefix'
41	  readonly ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfr_"
42	
43	  readonly ZRBFR_KINDLED=1
44	}
45	
46	zrbfr_sentinel() {
47	  zrbfc_sentinel
48	  test "${ZRBFR_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbfr not kindled - call zrbfr_kindle first"
49	}
50	
51	######################################################################
52	# Public Functions (rbfr_*)
53	
54	rbfr_wrest() {
55	  zrbfr_sentinel
56	
57	  local z_locator="${1:-}"
58	
59	  # Documentation block
60	  buc_doc_brief "Wrest an image from the registry to local container runtime by locator"
61	  buc_doc_param "locator" "Image locator in moniker:tag format"
62	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
63	
64	  # Validate locator parameter
65	  test -n "${z_locator}" || buc_die "Locator parameter required (moniker:tag)"
66	
67	  # Parse locator into moniker and tag
68	  case "${z_locator}" in
69	    *:*) : ;;
70	    *)   buc_die "Invalid locator format. Expected moniker:tag" ;;
71	  esac
72	  local z_moniker="${z_locator%%:*}"
73	  local z_tag="${z_locator#*:}"
74	  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "Moniker is empty in locator"
75	  test -n "${z_tag}" || buc_die "Tag is empty in locator"
76	
77	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
78	
79	  test -f "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Director credential not found: ${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
80	
81	  # Get OAuth token
82	  local z_token
83	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
84	
85	  buc_step "Logging into container registry"
86	
87	  # Construct full image reference
88	  local z_full_ref="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_locator}"
89	
90	  # Docker login to GAR
91	  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}" \
92	    || buc_die "Container runtime authentication failed"
93	
94	  buc_step "Pulling image: ${z_full_ref}"
95	
96	  # Pull image
97	  docker pull "${z_full_ref}" || buc_die "Image pull failed"
98	
99	  # Get local image ID
100	  local z_image_id
101	  docker inspect --format='{{.Id}}' "${z_full_ref}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null \
102	    || buc_die "Failed to get image ID"
103	  z_image_id=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
104	
105	  # Display results
106	  echo ""
107	  echo "Image wrested: ${z_full_ref}"
108	  echo "Local image ID: ${z_image_id}"
109	
110	  buc_success "Image wrest complete"
111	}
112	
113	rbfr_summon() {
114	  zrbfr_sentinel
115	
116	  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
117	  z_vessel="${z_vessel##*/}"  # strip path prefix — accept directory path or bare moniker
118	  local z_hallmark="${2:-}"
119	
120	  # Documentation block
121	  buc_doc_brief "Summon an ark (pull -image, -about, and -vouch artifacts as a coherent unit)"
122	  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel name (e.g., rbev-busybox)"
123	  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
124	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
125	
126	  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
127	  rbfc_require_vessel_sigil "${z_vessel}"
128	
129	  buc_step "Authenticating for retrieval"
130	  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
131	  local z_token
132	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
133	
134	  # List vouched hallmarks when hallmark parameter is missing
135	  if test -z "${z_hallmark}"; then
136	    local -r z_tags_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_tags.json"
137	    local -r z_stderr_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_tags_stderr.txt"
138	    curl -sL \
139	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
140	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
141	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
142	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/tags/list" \
143	      > "${z_tags_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
144	      || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags for ${z_vessel} — see ${z_stderr_file}"
145	    local -r z_all_tags_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_all_tags.txt"
146	    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" > "${z_all_tags_file}" \
147	      || buc_die "Failed to extract tags for ${z_vessel}"
148	    local -r z_vouched_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_vouched.txt"
149	    : > "${z_vouched_file}"
150	    local -r z_suffix="${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
151	    while IFS= read -r z_tag || test -n "${z_tag}"; do
152	      case "${z_tag}" in
153	        *"${z_suffix}") printf '%s\n' "${z_tag%"${z_suffix}"}" >> "${z_vouched_file}" ;;
154	      esac
155	    done < "${z_all_tags_file}"
156	    local -r z_sorted_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_vouched_sorted.txt"
157	    sort -r "${z_vouched_file}" > "${z_sorted_file}" \
158	      || buc_die "Failed to sort vouched hallmarks"
159	    if test -s "${z_sorted_file}"; then
160	      buc_step "Vouched hallmarks for ${z_vessel}:"
161	      while IFS= read -r z_h || test -n "${z_h}"; do
162	        buc_bare "        ${z_h}"
163	      done < "${z_sorted_file}"
164	    else
165	      buc_step "No vouched hallmarks found for ${z_vessel}"
166	    fi
167	    buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"
168	  fi
169	
170	  # Construct ark tags — all use full hallmark
171	  local z_image_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
172	  local z_about_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
173	  local z_vouch_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
174	
175	  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
176	
177	  # Check if -image artifact exists
178	  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_image_status.txt"
179	  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_image_response.json"
180	
181	  curl --head -s                                     \
182	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
183	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
184	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
185	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
186	    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
187	    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
188	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
189	    > "${z_image_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact"
190	
191	  local z_image_http_code
192	  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
193	  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
194	
195	  local z_image_exists=false
196	  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
197	    z_image_exists=true
198	  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
199	    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
200	  fi
201	
202	  # Check if -about artifact exists
203	  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_about_status.txt"
204	  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_about_response.json"
205	
206	  curl --head -s                                     \
207	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
208	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
209	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
210	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
211	    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
212	    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
213	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
214	    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
215	
216	  local z_about_http_code
217	  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
218	  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
219	
220	  local z_about_exists=false
221	  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
222	    z_about_exists=true
223	  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
224	    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
225	  fi
226	
227	  # Check if -vouch artifact exists
228	  local z_vouch_status_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_vouch_status.txt"
229	  local z_vouch_response_file="${ZRBFR_TEMP_PREFIX}summon_vouch_response.json"
230	
231	  curl --head -s                                     \
232	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
233	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"           \
234	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
235	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
236	    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
237	    -o "${z_vouch_response_file}"                   \
238	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_vouch_tag}" \
239	    > "${z_vouch_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -vouch artifact"
240	
241	  local z_vouch_http_code
242	  z_vouch_http_code=$(<"${z_vouch_status_file}")
243	  test -n "${z_vouch_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -vouch"
244	
245	  local z_vouch_exists=false
246	  if test "${z_vouch_http_code}" = "200"; then
247	    z_vouch_exists=true
248	  elif test "${z_vouch_http_code}" != "404"; then
249	    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_vouch_http_code} when checking -vouch artifact"
250	  fi
251	
252	  # Evaluate ark state
253	  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
254	    buc_die "Hallmark not found: neither -image nor -about exists"
255	  fi
256	
257	  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then

63	rbfv_vouch_gate() {
64	  zrbfv_sentinel
65	
66	  local -r z_vessel="${1:-}"
67	  local -r z_hallmark="${2:-}"
68	
69	  test -n "${z_vessel}"       || buc_die "rbfv_vouch_gate: vessel required"
70	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "rbfv_vouch_gate: hallmark required"
71	
72	  local -r z_registry_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
73	  local -r z_registry_api_base="https://${z_registry_host}/v2/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
74	
75	  local -r z_vouch_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
76	  buc_step "Vouch gate: checking ${z_vessel}:${z_vouch_tag}"
77	
78	  local z_token
79	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
80	    || buc_die "rbfv_vouch_gate: failed to get Director OAuth token"
81	
82	  local z_vouch_http_code
83	  curl --head -s \
84	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
85	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
86	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
87	    -o /dev/null \
88	    -w "%{http_code}" \
89	    "${z_registry_api_base}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_vouch_tag}" \
90	    > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
91	    || buc_die "rbfv_vouch_gate: HEAD request failed for ${z_vessel}:${z_vouch_tag}"
92	  z_vouch_http_code=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
93	
94	  if test "${z_vouch_http_code}" != "200"; then
95	    buc_die "Hallmark not vouched: ${z_vessel}:${z_hallmark} (HTTP ${z_vouch_http_code} — refusing to use unvouched image)"
96	  fi
97	
98	  buc_info "Vouch verified: ${z_vessel}:${z_vouch_tag}"
99	}
100	
101	rbfv_about() {
102	  zrbfv_sentinel
103	
104	  local -r z_hallmark="${2:-}"
105	  local -r z_conjure_build_id="${3:-}"  # Optional: conjure BUILD_ID for provenance
106	
107	  buc_doc_brief "Assemble about metadata artifact for an existing hallmark image"
108	  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
109	  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
110	  buc_doc_param "conjure_build_id" "(Optional) Cloud Build job ID from conjure"
111	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
112	
113	  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path) and load
114	  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${1:-}"
115	  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
116	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"
117	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
118	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"
119	
120	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
121	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
122	
123	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
124	  local z_token=""
125	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
126	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
127	
128	  # Gate: require -image exists
129	  buc_step "Gating on image artifact existence"
130	  local -r z_image_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
131	  local -r z_image_gate_status="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}image_status.txt"
132	  local -r z_image_gate_response="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}image_response.json"
133	  local -r z_image_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}image_stderr.txt"
134	
135	  curl --head -s \
136	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
137	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
138	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
139	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
140	    -w "%{http_code}" \
141	    -o "${z_image_gate_response}" \
142	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
143	    > "${z_image_gate_status}" 2>"${z_image_gate_stderr}" \
144	    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact — see ${z_image_gate_stderr}"
145	
146	  local -r z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_gate_status}")
147	  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
148	  test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200" \
149	    || buc_die "Image artifact not found (HTTP ${z_image_http_code}) — image must exist before about"
150	
151	  buc_info "Image artifact confirmed: ${z_image_tag}"
152	
153	  # Gate: warn if -about already exists (re-about is idempotent overwrite)
154	  local -r z_about_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
155	  local -r z_about_gate_status="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
156	  local -r z_about_gate_response="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}about_response.json"
157	  local -r z_about_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_ABOUT_PREFIX}about_stderr.txt"
158	
159	  curl --head -s \
160	    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
161	    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
162	    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
163	    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
164	    -w "%{http_code}" \
165	    -o "${z_about_gate_response}" \
166	    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
167	    > "${z_about_gate_status}" 2>"${z_about_gate_stderr}" \
168	    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact — see ${z_about_gate_stderr}"
169	
170	  local -r z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_gate_status}")
171	  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
172	  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
173	    buc_warn "Re-about in progress: ${z_about_tag} already exists"
174	  fi
175	
176	  # Submit about Cloud Build
177	  zrbfv_about_submit "${z_hallmark}" "${z_token}" "${z_conjure_build_id}"
178	
179	  buc_success "About complete: ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_hallmark}"
180	  buc_info "About artifact: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_about_tag}"
181	}

656	# Internal: Submit vouch Cloud Build job (mode-aware verification)
657	# All vessel modes use Cloud Build. The build scripts branch on _RBGV_VESSEL_MODE:
658	#   conjure: DSSE envelope signature verification (Python 3 + openssl)
659	#   bind: digest-pin comparison against upstream reference
660	#   graft: GRAFTED stamp (no verification)
661	zrbfv_vouch_submit() {
662	  zrbfv_sentinel
663	
664	  local -r z_hallmark="$1"
665	  local -r z_vouch_tag="$2"
666	  local -r z_token="$3"
667	
668	  buc_step "Constructing vouch Cloud Build resource"
669	  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
670	  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
671	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
672	
673	  # Mode-specific substitution values (empty strings for non-applicable modes)
674	  local z_bind_source=""
675	  local z_graft_source=""
676	
677	  case "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" in
678	    conjure) : ;;  # DSSE verification uses embedded keys, no extra substitutions
679	    bind)    z_bind_source="${RBRV_BIND_IMAGE:-}" ;;
680	    graft)   z_graft_source="${RBRV_GRAFT_IMAGE:-}" ;;
681	    *)       buc_die "Unknown vessel mode: ${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" ;;
682	  esac
683	
684	  # Resolve base image provenance (for vouch summary recording)
685	  local -r z_vi_gar_prefix="${z_gar_host}/${z_gar_path}/${RBRV_SIGIL}"
686	  local z_vi_ref_1="" z_vi_ref_2="" z_vi_ref_3=""
687	  local z_vi_prov_1="" z_vi_prov_2="" z_vi_prov_3=""
688	  local z_vi_n="" z_vi_origin_var="" z_vi_anchor_var="" z_vi_origin="" z_vi_anchor=""
689	  for z_vi_n in 1 2 3; do
690	    z_vi_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_vi_n}_ORIGIN"
691	    z_vi_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_vi_n}_ANCHOR"
692	    z_vi_origin="${!z_vi_origin_var:-}"
693	    z_vi_anchor="${!z_vi_anchor_var:-}"
694	    test -n "${z_vi_origin}" || continue
695	    local z_vi_ref="" z_vi_prov=""
696	    if test -n "${z_vi_anchor}"; then
697	      z_vi_ref="${z_vi_gar_prefix}:${z_vi_anchor}"
698	      z_vi_prov="anchored"
699	    else
700	      z_vi_ref="${z_vi_origin}"
701	      z_vi_prov="pass-through"
702	    fi
703	    case "${z_vi_n}" in
704	      1) z_vi_ref_1="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_1="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
705	      2) z_vi_ref_2="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_2="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
706	      3) z_vi_ref_3="${z_vi_ref}"; z_vi_prov_3="${z_vi_prov}" ;;
707	    esac
708	  done
709	
710	  # Assemble vouch steps via shared helper
711	  local -r z_vouch_steps_accumulator="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}steps.json"
712	  zrbfc_assemble_vouch_steps "${z_vouch_steps_accumulator}" "${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}"
713	
714	  buc_log_args "Composing vouch Build resource JSON"
715	  local -r z_vouch_build_file="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}build.json"
716	
717	  jq -n \
718	    --slurpfile zjq_steps       "${z_vouch_steps_accumulator}" \
719	    --arg zjq_sa                "${z_mason_sa}" \
720	    --arg zjq_gar_host          "${z_gar_host}" \
721	    --arg zjq_gar_path          "${z_gar_path}" \
722	    --arg zjq_vessel            "${RBRV_SIGIL}" \
723	    --arg zjq_hallmark      "${z_hallmark}" \
724	    --arg zjq_vessel_mode       "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" \
725	    --arg zjq_bind_source       "${z_bind_source}" \
726	    --arg zjq_graft_source      "${z_graft_source}" \
727	    --arg zjq_ark_suffix_image  "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}" \
728	    --arg zjq_ark_suffix_attest "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST}" \
729	    --arg zjq_ark_suffix_vouch  "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}" \
730	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_1          "${z_vi_ref_1}" \
731	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_1         "${z_vi_prov_1}" \
732	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_2          "${z_vi_ref_2}" \
733	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_2         "${z_vi_prov_2}" \
734	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_3          "${z_vi_ref_3}" \
735	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_3         "${z_vi_prov_3}" \
736	    --arg zjq_pool              "${RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP}" \
737	    --arg zjq_timeout           "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
738	    '{
739	      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
740	      substitutions: {
741	        _RBGV_GAR_HOST:          $zjq_gar_host,
742	        _RBGV_GAR_PATH:          $zjq_gar_path,
743	        _RBGV_VESSEL:            $zjq_vessel,
744	        _RBGV_HALLMARK:      $zjq_hallmark,
745	        _RBGV_VESSEL_MODE:       $zjq_vessel_mode,
746	        _RBGV_BIND_SOURCE:       $zjq_bind_source,
747	        _RBGV_GRAFT_SOURCE:      $zjq_graft_source,
748	        _RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE:  $zjq_ark_suffix_image,
749	        _RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST: $zjq_ark_suffix_attest,
750	        _RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH:  $zjq_ark_suffix_vouch,
751	        _RBGV_IMAGE_1:           $zjq_vi_ref_1,
752	        _RBGV_IMAGE_1_PROVENANCE: $zjq_vi_prov_1,
753	        _RBGV_IMAGE_2:           $zjq_vi_ref_2,
754	        _RBGV_IMAGE_2_PROVENANCE: $zjq_vi_prov_2,
755	        _RBGV_IMAGE_3:           $zjq_vi_ref_3,
756	        _RBGV_IMAGE_3_PROVENANCE: $zjq_vi_prov_3
757	      },
758	      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
759	      options: {
760	        automapSubstitutions: true,
761	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
762	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
763	      },
764	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
765	    }' > "${z_vouch_build_file}" \
766	    || buc_die "Failed to compose vouch build JSON"
767	
768	  buc_log_args "Vouch build JSON: ${z_vouch_build_file}"
769	
770	  buc_step "Submitting vouch Cloud Build"
771	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
772	    "vouch_build_create" "${z_vouch_build_file}"
773	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Vouch build submission" "vouch_build_create"
774	
775	  local z_build_id=""
776	  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "vouch_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
777	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
778	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
779	
780	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
781	  buc_info "Vouch build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
782	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
783	
784	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion 50 "Vouch"  # ~4 minutes at 5s intervals (private pool is slower)
785	}

790	rbfv_batch_vouch() {
791	  zrbfv_sentinel
792	
793	  buc_doc_brief "Vouch all pending hallmarks across all vessels"
794	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
795	
796	  buc_step "Enumerating vessels"
797	  local z_sigils
798	  z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
799	
800	  buc_step "Fetching OAuth token (Director)"
801	  local z_token
802	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
803	
804	  local z_vouched_count=0
805	  local z_already_count=0
806	  local z_failed_count=0
807	
808	  local z_sigil=""
809	  for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
810	
811	    buc_step "Scanning ${z_sigil} for pending hallmarks"
812	    local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_bv_${z_sigil}_tags.json"
813	    local z_stderr_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_bv_${z_sigil}_stderr.txt"
814	    curl -sL \
815	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
816	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
817	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
818	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_sigil}/tags/list" \
819	      > "${z_tags_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
820	      || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags for ${z_sigil} — see ${z_stderr_file}"
821	
822	    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
823	      local z_err
824	      jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
825	        || buc_die "Failed to extract error message from registry response for ${z_sigil}"
826	      z_err=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
827	      buc_die "Registry API error for ${z_sigil}: ${z_err}"
828	    fi
829	
830	    local z_all_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_bv_${z_sigil}_all_tags.txt"
831	    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" > "${z_all_tags_file}" \
832	      || buc_die "Failed to extract tags for ${z_sigil}"
833	
834	    # Classify: find hallmarks with -about but no -vouch
835	    local z_about_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_bv_${z_sigil}_has_about.txt"
836	    local z_vouch_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfv_bv_${z_sigil}_has_vouch.txt"
837	    : > "${z_about_file}"
838	    : > "${z_vouch_file}"
839	
840	    while IFS= read -r z_tag || test -n "${z_tag}"; do
841	      local z_consec=""
842	      if [[ "${z_tag}" =~ ^([cbg][0-9]{12}-r[0-9]{12}) ]]; then
843	        z_consec="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
844	      else
845	        continue
846	      fi
847	      case "${z_tag}" in
848	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}")
849	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_vouch_file}"
850	          ;;
851	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}")
852	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_about_file}"
853	          ;;
854	      esac
855	    done < "${z_all_tags_file}"
856	
857	    # Find pending: has about, no vouch

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJV Step 03: Build FROM scratch container with verification results, push as -vouch
3	# Builder: docker (from reliquary)
4	# Entrypoint: bash
5	# Substitutions: _RBGV_GAR_HOST, _RBGV_GAR_PATH, _RBGV_VESSEL,
6	#                _RBGV_HALLMARK, _RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH
7	#
8	# Note: The Dockerfile heredoc below is intentional — this script runs inside
9	# a Cloud Build container, not under BCG module discipline.
10	#
11	# Platforms are read from /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt (written by step 02).
12	# Multi-platform via buildx. No TARGETARCH needed — vouch content (JSON files)
13	# is architecture-independent. Multi-platform is for pull ergonomics only.
14	
15	set -euo pipefail
16	
17	echo "=== Assemble and push vouch artifact ==="
18	
19	# Read platforms from step 02 output
20	test -f /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt \
21	  || { echo "FATAL: /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt not found — step 02 must run first" >&2; exit 1; }
22	PLATFORMS=$(cat /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt)
23	test -n "${PLATFORMS}" || { echo "FATAL: vouch_platforms.txt is empty" >&2; exit 1; }
24	
25	VOUCH_TAG="${_RBGV_GAR_HOST}/${_RBGV_GAR_PATH}/${_RBGV_VESSEL}:${_RBGV_HALLMARK}${_RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
26	echo "Platforms: ${PLATFORMS}"
27	echo "Target: ${VOUCH_TAG}"
28	
29	mkdir -p /workspace/vouch_ctx
30	cp /workspace/vouch_summary.json /workspace/vouch_ctx/
31	
32	# Copy per-platform verification files if they exist (conjure only)
33	# shellcheck disable=SC2086
34	if ls /workspace/verify-*.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then
35	  cp /workspace/verify-*.json /workspace/vouch_ctx/
36	  echo "FROM scratch" > /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
37	  echo "COPY vouch_summary.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
38	  echo "COPY verify-*.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
39	else
40	  echo "FROM scratch" > /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
41	  echo "COPY vouch_summary.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
42	fi
43	
44	docker buildx inspect rb-builder >/dev/null 2>&1 \
45	  || docker buildx create --driver docker-container --name rb-builder
46	docker buildx use rb-builder
47	
48	docker buildx build \
49	  --push \
50	  --platform="${PLATFORMS}" \
51	  --tag "${VOUCH_TAG}" \
52	  /workspace/vouch_ctx
53	
54	echo "Vouch artifact pushed: ${VOUCH_TAG}"

59	    resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req)
60	    return json.loads(resp.read())["access_token"]

63	def gar_fetch(url, token, accept, method="GET"):
64	    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}", "Accept": accept}
65	    req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers, method=method)
66	    return urllib.request.urlopen(req)
67	
68	
69	def gar_json(url, token, accept):
70	    resp = gar_fetch(url, token, accept)
71	    return json.loads(resp.read())
72	
73	
74	def platform_string(plat_dict):
75	    """Build os/arch[/variant] string from a platform dict."""
76	    s = f"{plat_dict['os']}/{plat_dict['architecture']}"
77	    if plat_dict.get("variant"):
78	        s += f"/{plat_dict['variant']}"
79	    return s
80	
81	
82	def main():
83	    vessel_mode    = os.environ.get("_RBGV_VESSEL_MODE", "")
84	    gar_host       = require_env("_RBGV_GAR_HOST")
85	    gar_path       = require_env("_RBGV_GAR_PATH")
86	    vessel         = require_env("_RBGV_VESSEL")
87	    hallmark       = require_env("_RBGV_HALLMARK")
88	    ark_suffix_img = require_env("_RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE")
89	
90	    print(f"=== Mode-aware verification ({vessel_mode}) ===")
91	
92	    full_image = f"{gar_host}/{gar_path}/{vessel}"
93	    image_tag = f"{hallmark}{ark_suffix_img}"
94	    registry_base = f"https://{gar_host}/v2/{gar_path}/{vessel}"
95	
96	    token = metadata_token()
97	
98	    try:
99	        manifest = gar_json(f"{registry_base}/manifests/{image_tag}", token, ACCEPT_ALL)
100	    except Exception as e:
101	        die(f"Failed to fetch manifest for {image_tag}: {e}")
102	
103	    media_type = manifest.get("mediaType", "")
104	    is_index = "manifest.list" in media_type or "image.index" in media_type
105	
106	    # Discover platforms and write vouch_platforms.txt
107	    config = None
108	    if is_index:
109	        plats = []
110	        for m in manifest.get("manifests", []):
111	            p = m.get("platform", {})
112	            if p.get("os") == "unknown" and p.get("architecture") == "unknown":
113	                continue
114	            plats.append(platform_string(p))
115	        if not plats:
116	            die("No platforms")
117	        with open("/workspace/vouch_platforms.txt", "w") as f:
118	            f.write(",".join(plats))
119	    else:
120	        config_digest = manifest.get("config", {}).get("digest", "")
121	        if not config_digest:
122	            die("No config digest")
123	        try:
124	            config = gar_json(f"{registry_base}/blobs/{config_digest}", token, ACCEPT_ALL)
125	        except Exception as e:
126	            die(f"Failed to fetch config blob: {e}")
127	        ps = f"{config['os']}/{config['architecture']}"
128	        if config.get("variant"):
129	            ps += f"/{config['variant']}"
130	        with open("/workspace/vouch_platforms.txt", "w") as f:
131	            f.write(ps)
132	
133	    with open("/workspace/vouch_platforms.txt") as f:
134	        print(f"Platforms: {f.read()}")
135	
136	    if vessel_mode == "conjure":
137	        _verify_conjure(manifest, is_index, config, full_image, token,
138	                        registry_base, hallmark, vessel, ark_suffix_img)
139	    elif vessel_mode == "bind":
140	        _verify_bind(token, registry_base, image_tag, hallmark, vessel)
141	    elif vessel_mode == "graft":
142	        _verify_graft(hallmark, vessel)
143	    else:
144	        die(f"Unknown vessel mode: {vessel_mode}")
145	
146	
147	def _verify_conjure(manifest, is_index, config, full_image, token,
148	                    registry_base, hallmark, vessel, ark_suffix_img):
149	    builder_id = "https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com/GoogleHostedWorker"
150	    expected_keyid = ("projects/verified-builder/locations/global/keyRings/"
151	                      "attestor/cryptoKeys/google-hosted-worker/cryptoKeyVersions/1")
152	
153	    ark_suffix_attest = require_env("_RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_ATTEST")
154	
155	    # Build platform entries: [(digest, arch, variant), ...]
156	    # Resolve provenance-carrying digests from -attest-{arch} tags (HEAD request),
157	    # NOT from the -image manifest index (those are buildx-native digests with no GCB provenance).
158	    entries = []
159	    if is_index:
160	        for m in manifest.get("manifests", []):
161	            p = m.get("platform", {})
162	            if p.get("os") == "unknown" and p.get("architecture") == "unknown":
163	                continue
164	            arch = p["architecture"]
165	            variant = p.get("variant", "")
166	            ps = f"{arch}{variant}"
167	            at = f"{hallmark}{ark_suffix_attest}-{ps}"
168	            try:
169	                resp = gar_fetch(f"{registry_base}/manifests/{at}", token, ACCEPT_ALL, method="HEAD")
170	                ad = resp.headers.get("Docker-Content-Digest", "")
171	            except Exception:
172	                die(f"HEAD for {at} failed")
173	            if not ad:
174	                die(f"No digest for {at}")
175	            entries.append((ad, arch, variant))
176	    else:
177	        arch = config["architecture"]
178	        variant = config.get("variant", "")
179	        ps = f"{arch}{variant}"
180	        at = f"{hallmark}{ark_suffix_attest}-{ps}"
181	        try:
182	            resp = gar_fetch(f"{registry_base}/manifests/{at}", token, ACCEPT_ALL, method="HEAD")
183	            ad = resp.headers.get("Docker-Content-Digest", "")
184	        except Exception:
185	            die(f"HEAD for {at} failed")
186	        if not ad:
187	            die(f"No digest for {at}")
188	        entries.append((ad, arch, variant))
189	
190	    print(f"Verifying {len(entries)} platform(s) via DSSE")
191	    if not entries:
192	        die("no platform entries")
193	
194	    for digest, arch, variant in entries:
195	        ps = f"{arch}{variant}"
196	        fr = f"{full_image}@{digest}"
197	        print(f"  {ps}: fetching provenance...")
198	
199	        result = subprocess.run(
200	            ["gcloud", "artifacts", "docker", "images", "describe",
201	             fr, "--format", "json", "--show-provenance"],
202	            capture_output=True, text=True, check=True,
203	        )
204	        prov_data = json.loads(result.stdout)
205	
206	        with open(f"/workspace/prov-{ps}.json", "w") as f:
207	            f.write(result.stdout)
208	
209	        # Extract v1.0 DSSE envelope
210	        envelope = None
211	        for p in prov_data.get("provenance_summary", {}).get("provenance", []):
212	            if "intoto_slsa_v1" in p.get("noteName", ""):
213	                envelope = p.get("envelope")
214	                break
215	        if not envelope:
216	            die(f"No v1.0 envelope for {ps}")
217	
218	        with open(f"/workspace/env-{ps}.json", "w") as f:
219	            json.dump(envelope, f, indent=2)
220	            f.write("\n")
221	
222	        # Verify keyid
223	        ak = envelope["signatures"][0]["keyid"]
224	        if ak != expected_keyid:
225	            die(f"keyid mismatch: {ak}")
226	
227	        # Decode payload and signature (base64url)
228	        payload_raw = b64url_decode(envelope["payload"])
229	        sig_raw     = b64url_decode(envelope["signatures"][0]["sig"])
230	
231	        pl_file  = f"/workspace/pl-{ps}.raw"
232	        sig_file = f"/workspace/sig-{ps}.bin"
233	        with open(pl_file, "wb") as f:
234	            f.write(payload_raw)
235	        with open(sig_file, "wb") as f:
236	            f.write(sig_raw)
237	
238	        # Construct PAE (Pre-Authentication Encoding)
239	        payload_type = "application/vnd.in-toto+json"
240	        pae_header = f"DSSEv1 {len(payload_type)} {payload_type} {len(payload_raw)} ".encode()
241	        pae_file = f"/workspace/pae-{ps}.bin"
242	        with open(pae_file, "wb") as f:
243	            f.write(pae_header + payload_raw)
244	
245	        # Verify with openssl
246	        verify_result = subprocess.run(
247	            ["openssl", "dgst", "-sha256",
248	             "-verify", "/workspace/keys/google-hosted-worker.pub",
249	             "-signature", sig_file, pae_file],
250	            capture_output=True, text=True,
251	        )
252	        if verify_result.returncode != 0:
253	            die(f"DSSE verify FAILED for {ps}")
254	
255	        # Extract verification details from payload
256	        payload_json = json.loads(payload_raw)
257	        ab = payload_json["predicate"]["runDetails"]["builder"]["id"]
258	        if ab != builder_id:
259	            die(f"builder mismatch: {ab}")
260	
261	        bt = payload_json["predicate"]["buildDefinition"]["buildType"]
262	        sd = payload_json["subject"][0]["digest"]["sha256"]
263	
264	        verify_data = {
265	            "verifier": "dsse-envelope-v1",
266	            "builder_id": ab,
267	            "build_type": bt,
268	            "subject_digest": sd,
269	            "keyid": ak,
270	            "verdict": "pass",
271	        }
272	        with open(f"/workspace/verify-{ps}.json", "w") as f:
273	            json.dump(verify_data, f, indent=2)
274	            f.write("\n")
275	        print(f"  {ps}: DSSE verified OK")
276	
277	    print(f"All {len(entries)} platforms verified")
278	
279	    # Compose vouch summary
280	    vouch_summary = {
281	        "hallmark": hallmark,
282	        "vessel": vessel,
283	        "vessel_mode": "conjure",
284	        "verify_method": "dsse-envelope",
285	        "base_images": [],
286	        "platforms": [],
287	    }
288	
289	    for digest, arch, variant in entries:
290	        ps = f"{arch}{variant}"
291	        with open(f"/workspace/verify-{ps}.json") as f:
292	            vdata = json.loads(f.read())
293	        vdata["platform"] = ps
294	        vouch_summary["platforms"].append(vdata)
295	
296	    # Record base image provenance (anchored GAR refs or upstream pass-through)
297	    for slot in [1, 2, 3]:
298	        ref  = os.environ.get(f"_RBGV_IMAGE_{slot}", "")
299	        prov = os.environ.get(f"_RBGV_IMAGE_{slot}_PROVENANCE", "")
300	        if ref:
301	            vouch_summary["base_images"].append({"slot": slot, "ref": ref, "provenance": prov})
302	
303	    with open("/workspace/vouch_summary.json", "w") as f:
304	        json.dump(vouch_summary, f, indent=2)
305	        f.write("\n")
306	    print("Vouch summary composed")
307	
308	
309	def _verify_bind(token, registry_base, image_tag, hallmark, vessel):
310	    try:
311	        resp = gar_fetch(f"{registry_base}/manifests/{image_tag}", token, ACCEPT_ALL, method="HEAD")
312	        actual_digest = resp.headers.get("Docker-Content-Digest", "")
313	    except Exception:
314	        die("HEAD failed")
315	    if not actual_digest:
316	        die("No Docker-Content-Digest")
317	
318	    bind_source = os.environ.get("_RBGV_BIND_SOURCE", "")
319	    if "@" not in bind_source:
320	        die("no @ in BIND_SOURCE")
321	    pinned_digest = bind_source.split("@", 1)[1]
322	    if not pinned_digest:
323	        die("no digest in BIND_SOURCE")
324	    if actual_digest != pinned_digest:
325	        die(f"Digest mismatch \u2014 GAR: {actual_digest}  Pin: {pinned_digest}")
326	    print(f"Digest pin verified: {actual_digest}")
327	
328	    vouch_summary = {
329	        "hallmark": hallmark,
330	        "vessel": vessel,
331	        "vessel_mode": "bind",
332	        "verification": {
333	            "method": "digest-pin",
334	            "bind_source": bind_source,
335	            "actual_digest": actual_digest,
336	            "pinned_digest": pinned_digest,
337	            "verdict": "DIGEST_PIN_VERIFIED",
338	        },
339	    }
340	    with open("/workspace/vouch_summary.json", "w") as f:
341	        json.dump(vouch_summary, f, indent=2)
342	        f.write("\n")
343	    print("Vouch summary composed")
344	
345	
346	def _verify_graft(hallmark, vessel):
347	    print("Graft mode \u2014 stamping GRAFTED")
348	    graft_source = os.environ.get("_RBGV_GRAFT_SOURCE", "")
349	    vouch_summary = {
350	        "hallmark": hallmark,
351	        "vessel": vessel,
352	        "vessel_mode": "graft",
353	        "verification": {
354	            "method": "none",
355	            "graft_source": graft_source,
356	            "verdict": "GRAFTED",
357	        },
358	    }
359	    with open("/workspace/vouch_summary.json", "w") as f:
360	        json.dump(vouch_summary, f, indent=2)
361	        f.write("\n")
362	    print("Vouch summary composed")
363	
364	
365	if __name__ == "__main__":
366	    main()

373	zrbfc_assemble_about_steps() {
374	  zrbfc_sentinel
375	
376	  local -r z_output_file="$1"
377	  local -r z_temp_prefix="$2"
378	
379	  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
380	  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
381	  local -r z_about_step_defs=(
382	    "rbgja01-discover-platforms.py|${ZRBFC_TOOL_GCLOUD}|python3|discover-platforms"
383	    "rbgja02-syft-per-platform.sh|${ZRBFC_TOOL_DOCKER}|bash|syft-per-platform"
384	    "rbgja03-build-info-per-platform.py|${ZRBFC_TOOL_GCLOUD}|python3|build-info-per-platform"
385	    "rbgja04-assemble-push-about.sh|${ZRBFC_TOOL_DOCKER}|bash|assemble-push-about"
386	  )
387	
388	  echo "[]" > "${z_output_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize about steps JSON"
389	
390	  local z_adef=""
391	  local z_ascript=""
392	  local z_abuilder=""
393	  local z_aentrypoint=""
394	  local z_aid=""
395	  local z_ascript_path=""
396	  local z_abody_file=""
397	  local z_aescaped_file=""
398	  local z_asteps_file=""
399	  local z_abody=""
400	  local z_ashebang=""
401	
402	  for z_adef in "${z_about_step_defs[@]}"; do
403	    IFS='|' read -r z_ascript z_abuilder z_aentrypoint z_aid <<< "${z_adef}"
404	    z_ascript_path="${ZRBFC_RBGJA_STEPS_DIR}/${z_ascript}"
405	    z_abody_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_aid}_body.txt"
406	    z_aescaped_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_aid}_escaped.txt"
407	    z_asteps_file="${z_temp_prefix}${z_aid}_steps.json"
408	
409	    test -f "${z_ascript_path}" || buc_die "About step script not found: ${z_ascript_path}"
410	
411	    buc_log_args "Reading script body for ${z_aid} (skip shebang)"
412	    tail -n +2 "${z_ascript_path}" > "${z_abody_file}" \
413	      || buc_die "Failed to read about step script: ${z_ascript_path}"
414	    z_abody=$(<"${z_abody_file}")
415	    test -n "${z_abody}" || buc_die "Empty about script body: ${z_ascript_path}"
416	
417	    buc_log_args "Baking pinned image refs into script text"
418	    z_abody="${z_abody//\$\{ZRBF_TOOL_SYFT\}/${ZRBFC_TOOL_SYFT}}"
419	
420	    case "${z_aentrypoint}" in
421	      bash)    z_ashebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
422	      sh)      z_ashebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
423	      python3) z_ashebang="#!/usr/bin/env python3" ;;
424	      *)       buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_aentrypoint}" ;;
425	    esac
426	    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_ashebang}" "${z_abody}" > "${z_aescaped_file}" \
427	      || buc_die "Failed to write about script body for ${z_aid}"
428	
429	    buc_log_args "Appending about step ${z_aid} to JSON array"
430	    jq \
431	      --arg name "${z_abuilder}" \
432	      --arg id "${z_aid}" \
433	      --rawfile script "${z_aescaped_file}" \
434	      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
435	      "${z_output_file}" > "${z_asteps_file}" \
436	      || buc_die "Failed to append about step ${z_aid} to JSON"
437	    mv "${z_asteps_file}" "${z_output_file}" \
438	      || buc_die "Failed to update about steps JSON for ${z_aid}"
439	  done
440	}

```bash
zrbfc_plumb_core() {
  zrbfc_sentinel

  local z_vessel="${1:-}"
  z_vessel="${z_vessel##*/}"  # accept directory path or bare moniker
  local -r z_hallmark="${2:-}"
  local -r z_mode="${3}"

  rbfc_require_vessel_sigil "${z_vessel}"
  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"

  # Load vessel config (sets RBRV_VESSEL_MODE, RBRV_BIND_IMAGE, etc.)
  local -r z_vessel_dir="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_vessel}"
  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"

  # Construct local image references (as tagged by docker pull / summon)
  local -r z_about_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  local -r z_vouch_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
  local -r z_about_ref="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  local -r z_vouch_ref="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${z_vessel}:${z_vouch_tag}"

  # Check local availability of artifacts
  local z_has_about=false z_has_vouch=false
  docker image inspect "${z_about_ref}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_has_about=true
  docker image inspect "${z_vouch_ref}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_has_vouch=true

  # Bind vessels: use -about if available, fallback to static display
  if test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" = "bind"; then
    if test "${z_has_about}" = "false"; then
      zrbfc_plumb_show_bind "${z_vessel}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_mode}"
      return 0
    fi
    # Bind vessel with -about: fall through to shared extract+display path
  fi

  # Require -about locally present (summon must have been run)
  if test "${z_has_about}" = "false"; then
    buc_die "About artifact not locally present — run summon first"
  fi

  # Extract -about contents into temp directory
  buc_step "Extracting -about artifact"
  local -r z_extract="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/plumb"
  mkdir -p "${z_extract}" || buc_die "Failed to create extraction directory: ${z_extract}"
  local z_cid=""
  docker create "${z_about_ref}" x > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null \
    || buc_die "Failed to create container from -about artifact"
  z_cid=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
  docker cp "${z_cid}:/build_info.json"          "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
  docker cp "${z_cid}:/sbom.json"                "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
  docker cp "${z_cid}:/recipe.txt"               "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
  docker cp "${z_cid}:/buildkit_metadata.json"   "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
  docker cp "${z_cid}:/cache_before.json"        "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
  docker cp "${z_cid}:/cache_after.json"         "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
  docker rm "${z_cid}" >/dev/null 2>&1

  # Extract -vouch contents if locally present
  if test "${z_has_vouch}" = "true"; then
    buc_step "Extracting -vouch artifact"
    docker create "${z_vouch_ref}" x > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null \
      || buc_die "Failed to create container from -vouch artifact"
    z_cid=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
    docker cp "${z_cid}:/vouch_summary.json" "${z_extract}/" 2>/dev/null || true
    docker rm "${z_cid}" >/dev/null 2>&1
  fi

  # Display results
  if test "${z_mode}" = "compact"; then
    zrbfc_plumb_show_compact "${z_vessel}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_extract}" "${z_has_vouch}"
  else
    zrbfc_plumb_show_full "${z_vessel}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_extract}" "${z_has_vouch}"
  fi
}
```

**rbfv_vouch() — Main Vouch Orchestration (Lines 565-654):**

```bash
rbfv_vouch() {
  zrbfv_sentinel

  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
  local -r z_hallmark="${2:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "Vouch for an ark by mode-aware verification in Cloud Build"
  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
  buc_doc_param "hallmark" "Full hallmark (e.g., c260305133650-r260305160530)"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  if test -z "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
    local z_sigils
    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
    buc_step "Available vessels:"
    local z_sigil=""
    for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
      buc_bare "        ${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}"
    done
    buc_die "Vessel directory required"
  fi

  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark parameter required"

  # Resolve tool images from reliquary (vouch steps use tool images)
  zrbfc_resolve_tool_images

  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"

  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
  local z_token=""
  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"

  # Gate: require -about exists (about must complete before vouch)
  buc_step "Gating on about artifact existence"
  local -r z_about_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  local -r z_about_gate_status="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
  local -r z_about_gate_response="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}about_response.json"
  local -r z_about_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}about_stderr.txt"

  curl --head -s \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
    -w "%{http_code}" \
    -o "${z_about_gate_response}" \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
    > "${z_about_gate_status}" 2>"${z_about_gate_stderr}" \
    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact — see ${z_about_gate_stderr}"

  local -r z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_gate_status}")
  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
  test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200" \
    || buc_die "About artifact not found (HTTP ${z_about_http_code}) — about must complete before vouch"

  buc_info "About artifact confirmed: ${z_about_tag}"

  # Gate: warn if -vouch already exists (re-vouch)
  local -r z_vouch_tag="${z_hallmark}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
  local -r z_vouch_gate_status="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}vouch_status.txt"
  local -r z_vouch_gate_response="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}vouch_response.json"
  local -r z_vouch_gate_stderr="${ZRBFV_VOUCH_PREFIX}vouch_stderr.txt"

  curl --head -s \
    --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
    --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
    -w "%{http_code}" \
    -o "${z_vouch_gate_response}" \
    "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${RBRV_SIGIL}/manifests/${z_vouch_tag}" \
    > "${z_vouch_gate_status}" 2>"${z_vouch_gate_stderr}" \
    || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -vouch artifact — see ${z_vouch_gate_stderr}"

  local -r z_vouch_http_code=$(<"${z_vouch_gate_status}")
  test -n "${z_vouch_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -vouch"
  if test "${z_vouch_http_code}" = "200"; then
    buc_warn "Re-vouch in progress: ${z_vouch_tag} already exists"
  fi

  # All modes use Cloud Build for vouch (mode-aware verification inside the build)
  zrbfv_vouch_submit "${z_hallmark}" "${z_vouch_tag}" "${z_token}"

  buc_success "Vouch complete: ${RBRV_SIGIL}/${z_hallmark}"
  buc_info "Vouch artifact: ${RBRV_SIGIL}:${z_vouch_tag}"
}
```

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# RBGJV Step 03: Build FROM scratch container with verification results, push as -vouch
# Builder: docker (from reliquary)
# Entrypoint: bash

set -euo pipefail

echo "=== Assemble and push vouch artifact ==="

# Read platforms from step 02 output
test -f /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt \
  || { echo "FATAL: /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt not found — step 02 must run first" >&2; exit 1; }
PLATFORMS=$(cat /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt)
test -n "${PLATFORMS}" || { echo "FATAL: vouch_platforms.txt is empty" >&2; exit 1; }

VOUCH_TAG="${_RBGV_GAR_HOST}/${_RBGV_GAR_PATH}/${_RBGV_VESSEL}:${_RBGV_HALLMARK}${_RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
echo "Platforms: ${PLATFORMS}"
echo "Target: ${VOUCH_TAG}"

mkdir -p /workspace/vouch_ctx
cp /workspace/vouch_summary.json /workspace/vouch_ctx/

# Copy per-platform verification files if they exist (conjure only)
# shellcheck disable=SC2086
if ls /workspace/verify-*.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  cp /workspace/verify-*.json /workspace/vouch_ctx/
  echo "FROM scratch" > /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
  echo "COPY vouch_summary.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
  echo "COPY verify-*.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
else
  echo "FROM scratch" > /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
  echo "COPY vouch_summary.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
fi

docker buildx inspect rb-builder >/dev/null 2>&1 \
  || docker buildx create --driver docker-container --name rb-builder
docker buildx use rb-builder

docker buildx build \
  --push \
  --platform="${PLATFORMS}" \
  --tag "${VOUCH_TAG}" \
  /workspace/vouch_ctx

echo "Vouch artifact pushed: ${VOUCH_TAG}"
```
